description.zh-Hans: 应用九宫格缩放：将输入图像分割为3x3网格（四角、四边、中心），缩放输出时保持四角尺寸不变，拉伸四边和中心区域。
description.en: Applies 9-slice scaling: divides the input into a 3x3 grid (corners, edges, center) and scales the output preserving corner sizes while stretching edges and center.

triggers.zh-Hans: 九宫格, 九宫格缩放, 边框缩放

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 对UI元素纹理应用九宫格缩放，保持四角不变拉伸边框。
exampleUsage.en: Apply 9-slice scaling to a UI element texture, preserving corners while stretching borders.
